{
  "name": "personalwebsite",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "packageManager": "npm@10.9.2",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "postbuild": "next-sitemap --config next-sitemap.config.js && npm run build:resume-pdf",
    "build:resume-pdf": "tsx scripts/resume/build-pdf.ts",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:e2e": "playwright test",
    "ship-gate:projects": "tsx scripts/ship-gates/projects.ts",
    "ingest": "tsx scripts/llm/ingest.ts",
    "ingest:rebuild": "tsx scripts/llm/ingest.ts --rebuild",
    "db:generate": "drizzle-kit generate",
    "db:migrate": "tsx scripts/llm/migrate.ts"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@mdx-js/loader": "^3.1.1",
    "@mdx-js/react": "^3.1.1",
    "@next/mdx": "^16.2.4",
    "@radix-ui/react-dialog": "^1.1.15",
    "@radix-ui/react-visually-hidden": "^1.2.4",
    "@types/mdx": "^2.0.13",
    "@vercel/analytics": "^2.0.1",
    "drizzle-orm": "^0.45.2",
    "framer-motion": "^12.38.0",
    "fuse.js": "^7.3.0",
    "next": "^15.1.0",
    "next-sitemap": "^4.2.3",
    "pgvector": "^0.2.1",
    "postgres": "^3.4.9",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "zod": "^4.3.6",
    "zustand": "^5.0.12"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@anthropic-ai/tokenizer": "^0.0.4",
    "@axe-core/react": "^4.11.2",
    "@playwright/test": "^1.59.1",
    "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.2",
    "@types/node": "^22.0.0",
    "@types/react": "^19.0.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "axe-core": "^4.11.3",
    "drizzle-kit": "^0.31.10",
    "eslint": "^9.0.0",
    "eslint-config-next": "^15.1.0",
    "jsdom": "^29.0.2",
    "prettier": "^3.8.3",
    "stylelint": "^17.8.0",
    "stylelint-config-standard": "^40.0.0",
    "tsx": "^4.21.0",
    "typescript": "^5.0.0",
    "vitest": "^4.1.4"
  }
}

content.text:
All five required files were created, deps added to package.json (@anthropic-ai/sdk ^0.91.1, @upstash/redis ^1.37.0; zod was already present), and full project verification:

- File presence: all 5 verification files exist
- `npx tsc --noEmit`: clean
- `npx vitest run src/app/api/chat/route.test.ts`: 9/9 passed (happy path + empty retrieval + 5× 400 cases + 429 with Retry-After + 502 on Anthropic error)
- Full test suite: 170/170 passed across 17 files (no regressions)

Implementation notes:
- `route.ts` declares `runtime = "nodejs"` per §D, validates with zod, derives the IP via `x-forwarded-for` → `x-real-ip` → `req.ip` → `"anon"` (5/hr cap), runs the rate limiter, retrieves with `k: 8` and `topicHints`, assembles the prompt, appends a "no corpus context" note when retrieval is empty, then streams Anthropic deltas as SSE `event: token` frames followed by an `event: meta` frame with `{citations, usage, retrievedCount}` and a final `event: done`.
- `rateLimiter.ts` implements sliding windows (per-hour + per-day) over Upstash sorted sets with an in-memory fallback for local dev/tests; exports `setRateLimiterStore()` so tests can inject a clean `createMemoryStore()` per case.
- `anthropicClient.ts` wraps `sdk.messages.stream(...)`, exposing only `{tokens, finalUsage}` so tests can swap a fake client via `setAnthropicClient()`.

IMPL_RESULT: PASS

result:
All five required files were created, deps added to package.json (@anthropic-ai/sdk ^0.91.1, @upstash/redis ^1.37.0; zod was already present), and full project verification:

- File presence: all 5 verification files exist
- `npx tsc --noEmit`: clean
- `npx vitest run src/app/api/chat/route.test.ts`: 9/9 passed (happy path + empty retrieval + 5× 400 cases + 429 with Retry-After + 502 on Anthropic error)
- Full test suite: 170/170 passed across 17 files (no regressions)

Implementation notes:
- `route.ts` declares `runtime = "nodejs"` per §D, validates with zod, derives the IP via `x-forwarded-for` → `x-real-ip` → `req.ip` → `"anon"` (5/hr cap), runs the rate limiter, retrieves with `k: 8` and `topicHints`, assembles the prompt, appends a "no corpus context" note when retrieval is empty, then streams Anthropic deltas as SSE `event: token` frames followed by an `event: meta` frame with `{citations, usage, retrievedCount}` and a final `event: done`.
- `rateLimiter.ts` implements sliding windows (per-hour + per-day) over Upstash sorted sets with an in-memory fallback for local dev/tests; exports `setRateLimiterStore()` so tests can inject a clean `createMemoryStore()` per case.
- `anthropicClient.ts` wraps `sdk.messages.stream(...)`, exposing only `{tokens, finalUsage}` so tests can swap a fake client via `setAnthropicClient()`.
